product: Improvements to the notebook editing experience
tagline: The following improvements have been made to the notebook editing experience: Add a split view to edit notebooks side by side.
what_it_does: The following improvements have been made to the notebook editing experience: Add a split view to edit notebooks side by side. Pressing Cmd + F (Mac) or Ctrl + F (Windows) in a notebook now opens the native Databricks find and replace tool. This allows you to quickly search and replace text throughout your entire notebook, including content outside the current viewport.
why_it_matters: The following improvements have been made to the notebook editing experience: Add a split view to edit notebooks side by side.
plain_summary: The following improvements have been made to the notebook editing experience: Add a split view to edit notebooks side by side. Pressing Cmd + F (Mac) or Ctrl + F (Windows) in a notebook now opens the native Databricks find and replace tool.
key_takeaway: The following improvements have been made to the notebook editing experience: Add a split view to edit notebooks side by side.
